page.title: Reports
page.subtitle: Generate insights about your financial health
page.searchPlaceholder: Search reports by name or description...
page.reportCount: {count, plural, one {# report available} other {# reports available}}

descriptions.spending-by-category: See where your money goes with a breakdown of expenses by category over time.
descriptions.spending-by-payee: Track how much you spend with each merchant or vendor over time.
descriptions.monthly-spending-trend: View your spending patterns month over month to identify trends.
descriptions.income-vs-expenses: Compare your income to expenses and track your savings rate over time.
descriptions.income-by-source: Break down your income streams to understand where your money comes from.
descriptions.net-worth: Track your total net worth including all accounts, assets, and liabilities.
descriptions.account-balances: View balance history for all your accounts over a selected time period.
descriptions.cash-flow: Detailed view of money coming in and going out across all accounts.
descriptions.tax-summary: Annual summary of tax-deductible expenses and taxable income.
descriptions.year-over-year: Compare this year to previous years to track financial progress.
descriptions.debt-payoff-timeline: Visualize your debt reduction progress with projections for payoff dates.
descriptions.loan-amortization: Detailed payment schedules for mortgages and loans with principal vs interest breakdown.
descriptions.investment-performance: Track portfolio returns, gains/losses, and asset allocation over time.
descriptions.dividend-income: Track capital gains and losses (realized + unrealized) alongside dividend and interest income.
descriptions.sector-weightings: Analyze portfolio sector exposure from individual stocks and ETFs.
descriptions.realized-gains: Track realized gains and losses from sold securities for tax planning and performance review.
descriptions.portfolio-value: Visualize your total investment portfolio value with historical trends and period returns.
descriptions.investment-transactions: Complete history of all investment transactions with filtering by action, account, and date.
descriptions.security-type-allocation: View portfolio allocation by asset type (stocks, ETFs, mutual funds, bonds) with drill-down into holdings.
descriptions.geographic-allocation: Analyze portfolio geographic exposure by exchange and region for diversification insights.
descriptions.dividend-yield-growth: Track dividend yield, per-security yields, year-over-year growth, and payment frequency analysis.
descriptions.security-performance: Deep dive into individual security performance with price history, transactions, and returns.
descriptions.currency-exposure: Understand currency risk with portfolio allocation by currency and exchange rate details.
descriptions.monte-carlo-simulation: Project future portfolio outcomes with thousands of randomized return paths and a saved-scenario library.
descriptions.recurring-expenses: Identify and monitor subscriptions, memberships, and recurring charges.
descriptions.spending-anomalies: Detect unusually large transactions and spending spikes that need attention.
descriptions.weekend-weekday-spending: Analyze your spending patterns based on day of week to understand habits.
descriptions.monthly-comparison: Compare any month to the previous month across income, expenses, net worth, and investments.
descriptions.uncategorized-transactions: Find and categorize transactions that are missing categories.
descriptions.duplicate-transactions: Identify potential duplicate entries that may need review or deletion.
descriptions.upcoming-bills: Visual calendar of scheduled transactions and upcoming bill due dates.
descriptions.bill-payment-history: Track payment patterns and history for recurring bills and scheduled transactions.
descriptions.budget-vs-actual: Compare your budgeted amounts to actual spending over time across all categories.
descriptions.budget-health-score: Get a 0-100 health score for your budget with detailed per-category impact analysis.
descriptions.budget-seasonal-patterns: Discover seasonal trends and high-spending months across your budget categories.
descriptions.budget-trend: Line chart showing total budgeted vs total actual spending over 6-12 months to track improvement.
descriptions.category-performance: Table showing each category budget performance over multiple months with trend indicators.
descriptions.savings-rate: Track your savings rate (income minus expenses divided by income) over time vs your target.
descriptions.health-score-history: Line chart of monthly budget health scores showing your financial trajectory over time.
descriptions.flex-group-analysis: Stacked bar chart for each flex group showing component categories with group limit reference.
descriptions.seasonal-spending-map: Heatmap grid showing 12 months across all categories to identify seasonal spending patterns.

duplicateTransactions.howDetectedHigh: High: Same date, amount, and payee
duplicateTransactions.howDetectedMedium: Medium: Same date and amount, or same payee and amount within a few days
duplicateTransactions.howDetectedLow: Low: Same amount within the date range

columnChooser.addAtLeastOne: Add at least one column from the list.

investmentReportForm.columnsDescription: Choose which columns to show and drag the order with the arrows. Symbol is always included.
investmentReportForm.accountsNote: Leave empty to include all of your investment accounts.
investmentReportForm.groupByNote: Rows are grouped by {groupByLabel} and sorted within each group.
investmentReportForm.mergeAccountsLabel: Combine the same security held in multiple accounts
investmentReportForm.mergeAccountsNote: When off, each account's holding is listed separately with an Account column.
investmentReportForm.asOfDateNote: Leave empty to always value the report as of the last day the markets were open.
investmentReportForm.descriptionPlaceholder: Brief description of what this report shows

investmentReportViewer.nativeNote: Values shown in each holding's native currency.
investmentReportViewer.noHoldings: No holdings found for the selected accounts and date.

investmentPerformance.noHoldings: No investment holdings found. Add securities to your investment accounts to see performance data.

investmentTransactions.noTransactions: No investment transactions found for this period.

loanAmortization.empty: No loan or mortgage accounts found. Add a loan account to see the payment history.
loanAmortization.noPayments: No payments found for this loan. Make payments to your loan account to see them here.

monteCarlo.noScenarios: No saved scenarios. Configure inputs on the right and click Save.
monteCarlo.useCurrentBalance: Use current balance on each run
monteCarlo.withdrawalNote: Annual withdrawal is in today's value and is grown by the inflation rate each year so purchasing power stays constant throughout the withdrawal phase. The success-rate target is also compared against each path's final value in today's terms.
monteCarlo.cashFlowsNote: One-time or recurring inflows / outflows that layer on top of the base contribution and withdrawal phases. Use a positive amount for income (pension, sale proceeds, inheritance) and a negative amount for expenses (renovation, college, etc).
monteCarlo.useHistoricalReturns: Use historical returns from selected accounts
monteCarlo.historicalNote: Mean and volatility are recomputed from the year-over-year price history of the holdings in the selected accounts each time you run. Inflation and simulation count below still apply.
monteCarlo.saveAsDialogDesc: Enter a name for this scenario. Keep the existing name to overwrite.
monteCarlo.deleteConfirmMessage: This will permanently delete "{name}" and any cash flows attached to it.
monteCarlo.overwriteConfirmMessage: A scenario named "{name}" already exists. Saving will replace its inputs and cash flows.

monteCarloPerformance.rowTwrNominalDesc: Geometric mean of the simulated annual returns. Ignores cash flows and is reported in nominal terms (not adjusted for inflation).
monteCarloPerformance.rowTwrRealDesc: Geometric mean of the simulated annual returns, adjusted for inflation so the result is in today's purchasing power.
monteCarloPerformance.rowEndBalanceNominalDesc: Final portfolio value at the end of the simulation horizon, in future-dollar (nominal) terms.
monteCarloPerformance.rowEndBalanceRealDesc: Final portfolio value discounted back to today's purchasing power using the inflation rate.
monteCarloPerformance.rowMeanReturnNominalDesc: Arithmetic average of the simulated annual returns. Always greater than or equal to the time-weighted return when volatility is non-zero.
monteCarloPerformance.rowAnnualizedVolatilityDesc: Standard deviation of the simulated annual returns — a measure of how much returns vary year-to-year.
monteCarloPerformance.rowMaxDrawdownDesc: Largest peak-to-trough drop in portfolio value during the simulation, including the effect of contributions and withdrawals.
monteCarloPerformance.rowMaxDrawdownExCashflowsDesc: Largest peak-to-trough drop driven purely by investment returns, ignoring contributions and withdrawals.
monteCarloPerformance.rowSafeWithdrawalRateDesc: Largest constant inflation-adjusted withdrawal, expressed as a percentage of the starting balance, that exactly depletes the portfolio at the end of the horizon.
monteCarloPerformance.rowPerpetualWithdrawalRateDesc: Largest constant inflation-adjusted withdrawal, as a percentage of the starting balance, that preserves the real value of the portfolio at the end of the horizon.

monteCarloHoldingStats.selectAccounts: Select one or more accounts to see per-holding historical returns.

portfolioValue.intradayFallbackTitleGeneric: Detailed intraday pricing isn't available because one or more holdings use MSN Money, which doesn't expose intraday quotes. Showing daily snapshots instead.
